info.description: OSShip open-source mentorship platform API exposed via the gateway.
info.title: OSShip API

get.description: Handles GitHub OAuth redirect and issues a JWT.

post.description: Issues a new token from a valid existing JWT.
Creates an account and returns a JWT.

get.description: Returns mentorship listings filtered by status and optional OSS project.

post.description: Creates a mentorship listing (approved mentor only).

get.description: Returns a single listing by ID.

patch.description: Updates a listing owned by the authenticated mentor.
Approves or rejects a mentor application (admin only).

post.description: Submits a mentor application with GitHub contribution data.
Starts checkout for a listing enrollment. Uses Stripe Connect when the mentor is onboarded.
Creates or resumes Stripe Express onboarding for a mentor.

get.description: Returns whether the mentor has completed Stripe Connect onboarding.
Returns payment ledger entries for a listing (mentor or admin).

post.description: Creates a mentorship session with a Jitsi room (mentor only).

get.description: Returns scheduled sessions for a mentorship listing.
Returns progress notes for an enrollment.

post.description: Records a progress entry for an enrollment.
Returns the Jitsi URL for an authorized participant.
Creates a pending enrollment for checkout.
Marks an enrollment active after successful payment.

patch.description: Updates display name, bio, or GitHub username.

post.description: Records a pull request URL and verifies merge status when possible.

get.description: Returns a user profile. Email is included when requesting your own profile.
